verses.text: Am I not an apostle? have I not seen Jesus? 'ye are the seal of mine apostleship.' Proven calling. Their conversion confirms his office.
Am I not an apostle? have I not seen Jesus? 'ye are the seal of mine apostleship.' Proven calling. Their conversion confirms his office.
Am I not an apostle? have I not seen Jesus? 'ye are the seal of mine apostleship.' Proven calling. Their conversion confirms his office.
Have we not power to eat and drink, and be supported? A right to support. The apostles might justly be maintained.
Have we not power to eat and drink, and be supported? A right to support. The apostles might justly be maintained.
Have we not power to eat and drink, and be supported? A right to support. The apostles might justly be maintained.
Who goes to war at his own cost? 'thou shalt not muzzle the ox.' Worthy labourer. The worker deserves his keep.
Who goes to war at his own cost? 'thou shalt not muzzle the ox.' Worthy labourer. The worker deserves his keep.
Who goes to war at his own cost? 'thou shalt not muzzle the ox.' Worthy labourer. The worker deserves his keep.
Who goes to war at his own cost? 'thou shalt not muzzle the ox.' Worthy labourer. The worker deserves his keep.
If we sowed spiritual things, is it much to reap your carnal? yet we used not this power. Foregone right. He waived support for the gospel's sake.
If we sowed spiritual things, is it much to reap your carnal? yet we used not this power. Foregone right. He waived support for the gospel's sake.
They that minister of holy things live of the temple; 'the Lord ordained that they... live of the gospel.' Ordained provision. God provides for His ministers.
They that minister of holy things live of the temple; 'the Lord ordained that they... live of the gospel.' Ordained provision. God provides for His ministers.
I have used none of these; 'woe is unto me, if I preach not the gospel!' Compelled. Necessity, not gain, drives his preaching.
I have used none of these; 'woe is unto me, if I preach not the gospel!' Compelled. Necessity, not gain, drives his preaching.
I have used none of these; 'woe is unto me, if I preach not the gospel!' Compelled. Necessity, not gain, drives his preaching.
I have used none of these; 'woe is unto me, if I preach not the gospel!' Compelled. Necessity, not gain, drives his preaching.
Though free, 'I made myself servant unto all, that I might gain the more.' Servant to all. He yields his freedom to win souls.
Though free, 'I made myself servant unto all, that I might gain the more.' Servant to all. He yields his freedom to win souls.
To the weak I became weak; 'I am made all things to all men, that I might by all means save some.' Winning love. He adapts himself to reach every kind of man.
To the weak I became weak; 'I am made all things to all men, that I might by all means save some.' Winning love. He adapts himself to reach every kind of man.
To the weak I became weak; 'I am made all things to all men, that I might by all means save some.' Winning love. He adapts himself to reach every kind of man.
They that run in a race all run; 'so run, that ye may obtain'; the temperate seek a crown. Run to win. The Christian life is an earnest race.
They that run in a race all run; 'so run, that ye may obtain'; the temperate seek a crown. Run to win. The Christian life is an earnest race.
I 'keep under my body, and bring it into subjection,' lest I myself be a castaway. Self-discipline. Even the apostle guards against falling.
